title: Mission Spec
description: Per-mission specification produced by the intake gate. Each mission gets its own spec file.

producer_type.description: Agent type that created this spec

mission_id.description: Sequential mission ID matching filename (e.g., mission-003)

constraints.description: Technical or business constraints (e.g., 'Must use relational database', 'No paid APIs')

assumptions.description: Assumptions surfaced during intake that the user confirmed

acceptance_criteria.description: Measurable criteria that define 'done'. Minimum 3 required.

scope_out.description: Features and capabilities explicitly excluded. Minimum 1 required to prove scope was considered.

ambiguity_notes.description: Remaining ambiguities acknowledged but deferred (with rationale)

source.description: How this spec was created. 'full_intake' = complete Socratic intake. 'quick_intake' = minimal auto-generated spec (user skipped detailed intake). 'existing_project' = auto-generated for first-time geas usage on an existing project.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the spec was frozen
